name: Frostbitten Prophecy

keyword_abilities.granted_to: Friendly Savage models of Sz 3 or greater

abilities.name: Demise (Read Entrails)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, it may drain a (t). This model draws a card, plus an additional card if it drained a (t). Then, discard a card.

abilities.name: The Land Yields
abilities.text: When this model is counted for scoring strategies and schemes, it is treated as two models instead of one.

actions.name: Frozen Vigor
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Other ally only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Target is moved up to 5" and gains an Insight token.

extraction_notes: Frozen Vigor is marked with a signature symbol (†) indicating it is a signature action
